title: ASXL1-mutated AML
question: ASXL1 mutation is most closely associated with:
options: Myelodysplasia-related genetic features and integrated risk assessment.
correct_answer: A. Myelodysplasia-related genetic features and integrated risk assessment.
explanation: ASXL1 is an important myelodysplasia-related gene and contributes to integrated classification.
references: WHO Classification of Haematolymphoid Tumours, 5th edition
